title: C3.ai Q4 Preliminary Results: Revenues Meet Expectations, Loss Narrows
text: C3.ai reported fiscal fourth quarter revenues of $51.6 million, falling within its guidance range of $48-$52 million. The company's non-GAAP operating loss reached $54.4 million, beating expectations of $56-$64 million. For the full fiscal year 2026, total revenues hit $250.3 million, matching the guided range of $246.7-$250.7 million. The full-year non-GAAP operating loss of $217.8 million also outperformed the projected range of $219.5-$227.5 million. During Q4, C3.ai signed 28 agreements, including nine new Initial Production Deployments and seven conversions. However, the company acknowledged that bookings were lower than expected. C3.ai maintains a strong cash position of $575.4 million in cash, equivalents, and investments. The company's restructuring initiative remains on track to deliver roughly $135 million in annualized non-GAAP cost savings and reduce cash burn by a similar amount. AI stock declined 7.3% following the announcement. Over three months, shares have fallen 18.7%, underperforming its industry by 12.4 percentage points.
